title: salsola gemmascens subsp. passerina
intro: Salsola gemmascens subsp. passerina, also known as Russian thistle or salsola passerina, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues.
